title: Account
description: Manage your user profile and preferences

profileInfo.title: Profile Information
profileInfo.description: Manage your personal information and account details
profileInfo.name: Name

securitySettings.title: Security Settings
securitySettings.description: Manage your account security and authentication preferences
securitySettings.passwordDescription: Change your password to keep your account secure

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect your account with external services and tools

regional.title: Regional Settings
regional.description: Configure your language and timezone preferences

password.title: Change Password
password.description: Enter your current password and choose a new password

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account
twoFactor.enableDescription: Secure your account by enabling two-factor authentication.
twoFactor.disableDescription: Are you sure you want to disable two-factor authentication? This will make your account less secure.
twoFactor.cantScan: Can't scan? You can manually enter the secret key in your authenticator app
twoFactor.verifTotpDescription: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app to complete two-factor authentication setup.
twoFactor.backupCodesDescription: Keep these backup codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once.

alerts.containerStatusChanges: Get notified when containers start, stop, or crash
alerts.imageStatusChanges: Get notified when images are pulled, built, or removed
alerts.volumeStatusChanges: Get notified when volumes are created or deleted
alerts.buildStatusChanges: Get notified when builds complete or fail

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.confirmSignOut: Are you sure you want to sign out? You will need to log in again to access your account.
dangerZone.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
